## Summary

<!-- What does this PR add/change/fix? -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] New opportunity record(s)
- [ ] Correction/update to existing record(s)
- [ ] Record archived (opportunity discontinued)
- [ ] Schema/documentation change
- [ ] Other

## Sourcing

<!-- Link the official source(s) used to verify this information. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Information is sourced from an official website/documentation (not a third-party aggregator).
- [ ] All required columns from `docs/DatabaseSchema.md` are filled; `UNKNOWN` used only where the source truly omits information.
- [ ] `ID` follows the correct prefix and is not reused or renumbered.
- [ ] Dates use `YYYY-MM-DD`, or `Rolling`/`UNKNOWN` where explicitly allowed.
- [ ] `Last_Verified` is set to today's date.
- [ ] No existing verified rows were removed or altered without justification.
- [ ] Column order was not changed (unless this PR is a documented structural change).
